wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikidata redirect
wikidata and wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because wikidata tag points to a redirect that should be followed
Q3743661 vs Q55084498
Terzo Valico dei Giovi - an affected OSM element that may be improved

overpass query usable in JOSM that will load all objects where this specific error is present:
[out:xml][timeout:3600]; ( relation(9434316)['wikidata'='Q3743661']['wikipedia'='it:Terzo valico']; ); (._;>;); out meta qt;//['wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikidata redirect']


malformed secondary wikidata tag
malformed old_name:etymology:wikidata tag (Anticamente qua sorgeva la zecca ducale di Vercelli.)
Vicolo San Salvatore - an affected OSM element that may be improved

malformed old_name:etymology:wikidata tag (Anticamente qua sorgeva la zecca ducale di Vercelli.)
Via San Salvatore - an affected OSM element that may be improved

overpass query usable in JOSM that will load all objects where this specific error is present:
[out:xml][timeout:3600]; ( way(64880074)['old_name:etymology:wikidata'='Anticamente qua sorgeva la zecca ducale di Vercelli.']; way(64880099)['old_name:etymology:wikidata'='Anticamente qua sorgeva la zecca ducale di Vercelli.']; ); (._;>;); out meta qt;//['malformed secondary wikidata tag']


should use a secondary wikipedia tag - linking to a vehicle model or class
linked wikidata entry (Q324744) is about a vehicle model or class, so it is very unlikely to be correct
subject:wikipedia=* or model:wikipedia tag would be probably better (see https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:wikipedia#Secondary_Wikipedia_links for full list of what else may be applicable)
in case of change remember to remove wikidata tag if it is present
object categorised by Wikidata - wrong classification may be caused by wrong data on Wikidata
Fiat G.91 - an affected OSM element that may be improved

linked wikidata entry (Q190211) is about a vehicle model or class, so it is very unlikely to be correct
subject:wikipedia=* or model:wikipedia tag would be probably better (see https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:wikipedia#Secondary_Wikipedia_links for full list of what else may be applicable)
in case of change remember to remove wikidata tag if it is present
object categorised by Wikidata - wrong classification may be caused by wrong data on Wikidata
DC3 "Dakota" - an affected OSM element that may be improved

overpass query usable in JOSM that will load all objects where this specific error is present:
[out:xml][timeout:3600]; ( node(4370883971)['wikidata'='Q324744']; node(6278257549)['wikidata'='Q190211']; ); (._;>;); out meta qt;//['should use a secondary wikipedia tag - linking to a vehicle model or class']
